/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/srf_onnx.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsrf_onnx.so -o libsrf_onnx.so "CMakeFiles/srf_onnx.dir/FaceRecognition_ArcFace-RetinaFace/CUDA/srf_onnx_bridge.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ulises/Documentos/FaceRecognition/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/onnxruntime/capi /home/ulises/Documentos/FaceRecognition/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/onnxruntime/capi/libonnxruntime.so.1.24.4
